Id.description: The ID of the contact log being updated.

Test.description:
When `true`, indicates that this is a test request and no data is inserted into the subscriber’s database.
When `false`, the database is updated.

AssignedToStaffId.description: The ID of the staff member to whom the contact log is now being assigned.

ContactName.description: The name of the new person to be contacted by the assigned staff member.

FollowupByDate.description: The new date by which the assigned staff member should complete this contact log.

ContactMethod.description: The new method by which the client wants to be contacted.

IsComplete.description: When `true`, indicates that the contact log is complete. When `false`, indicates the contact log isn’t complete.

Comments.description: Contains information about the comments being updated or added to the contact log. Comments that have an ID of `0` are added to the contact log.

Types.description: Contains information about the contact logs types being assigned to the contact log, in addition to the contact log types that are already assigned.
